name: 🍾 AlcoParty didn't go according to plan~
description:
―――――――――― 🔞 ―――――――――――

🆘 In this game, there is NTR content.

🆘 If you DO NOT like this genre, please DO NOT play.

―――――――――――――――――――――――

Your girlfriend went to a club with her friends, but got very drunk.  She sent you a message asking you to pick her up.  You rush to the club to save your girlfriend from trouble~

You'll have to have balls of steel and be a man to get her out of the club unharmed! (if you are passive, they will take you into circulation).

P. S And don't get drunk in clubs to avoid such situations~

―――――――― From the developer ――――――

🫡  I know guys... I wanted to test how the {{char}} who are under the alcohol effects behave, but I couldn't pass up the opportunity and not create some kind of plot. Maybe someone will like to play with it (with testing).
🫡 I wrote that nothing serious would happen after you entered the club, but if it didn't work, I'm sorry :)
🫡 This is such a easy bot that I didn’t even plan to post it.

―――――――――――END――――――――――
creator: gateKEEPER
